x.js(2,5): error TS6424: A module with multiple 'module.exports' assignments cannot be serialized.
x.js(2,5): error TS6425: A module with nested CommonJS export constructs cannot be serialized.
x.js(5,5): error TS6424: A module with multiple 'module.exports' assignments cannot be serialized.
x.js(5,5): error TS6425: A module with nested CommonJS export constructs cannot be serialized.


==== y.js (0 errors) ====
    const x = require("./x");
    const a = x.a;
    const b = x.b;
    
==== x.js (4 errors) ====
    if (!!true) {
        module.exports = { a: 1 };
        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS6424: A module with multiple 'module.exports' assignments cannot be serialized.
        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS6425: A module with nested CommonJS export constructs cannot be serialized.
    }
    else {
        module.exports = { b: "hello" };
        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS6424: A module with multiple 'module.exports' assignments cannot be serialized.
        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS6425: A module with nested CommonJS export constructs cannot be serialized.
    }
